---
title: "make_ascat_multiday.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../ascat.html)

Builds 1-day, 3-day, 7-day, and monthly ASCAT-C wind composites.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/ascat/scripts/make_ascat_multiday.py >}}
```

:::
